mapper.select: select special_day as date, is_holiday as isHoliday from dp_special_holiday
mapper.insert:
insert into ehr_company (compID, compCode, compName, compAbbr, adminID, compGrade, compType, compArea, effectDate, lawyer, address, regAddress, tel, fax, postCode, webSite, isDisabled, disabledDate, remark ) values
(#{item.compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.compCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.compName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.compAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.compGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.compType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.compArea,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.effectDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.lawyer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.regAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fax,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.webSite,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.isDisabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{item.disabledDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE compCode = VALUES(compCode), compName = VALUES(compName), compAbbr = VALUES(compAbbr), adminID = VALUES(adminID), compGrade = VALUES(compGrade), compType = VALUES(compType), compArea = VALUES(compArea), effectDate = VALUES(effectDate), lawyer = VALUES(lawyer), address = VALUES(address), regAddress = VALUES(regAddress), tel = VALUES(tel), fax = VALUES(fax), postCode = VALUES(postCode), webSite = VALUES(webSite), isDisabled = VALUES(isDisabled), disabledDate = VALUES(disabledDate), remark = VALUES(remark)

insert into ehr_department (depID, depCode, depName, depAbbr, compID, adminID, depGrade, depType, depProperty, depCost, director, director2, depEmp, depNum, effectDate, xOrder, isDisabled, disabledDate, remark, depCustom1, depCustom2, depCustom3, depCustom4, depCustom5) values
(#{item.depID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.depCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.depAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.depGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.depType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.depProperty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.depCost,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.director,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.director2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.depEmp,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.depNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.effectDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.xOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.isDisabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{item.disabledDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.depCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.depCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.depCustom3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.depCustom4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.depCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE depCode = VALUES(depCode), depName = VALUES(depName), depAbbr = VALUES(depAbbr), compID = VALUES(compID), adminID = VALUES(adminID), depGrade = VALUES(depGrade), depType = VALUES(depType), depProperty = VALUES(depProperty), depCost = VALUES(depCost), director = VALUES(director), director2 = VALUES(director2), depEmp = VALUES(depEmp), depNum = VALUES(depNum), effectDate = VALUES(effectDate), xOrder = VALUES(xOrder), isDisabled = VALUES(isDisabled), disabledDate = VALUES(disabledDate), remark = VALUES(remark), depCustom1 = VALUES(depCustom1), depCustom2 = VALUES(depCustom2), depCustom3 = VALUES(depCustom3), depCustom4 = VALUES(depCustom4), depCustom5 = VALUES(depCustom5)

insert into ehr_job (jobID, jobCode, jobName, jobAbbr, depID, adminID, jobGrage, jobType, jobProperty, jobNum, isCore, effectDate, xorder, isDisabled, disabledDate, remark, xType, jobCustom1, jobCustom2, jobCustom3, jobCustom4, jobCustom5 ) values
(#{item.jobID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.jobCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.jobAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.depID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.jobGrage,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.jobType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.jobProperty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.jobNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.isCore,jdbcType=BIT}, #{item.effectDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.xorder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.isDisabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{item.disabledDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.xType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.jobCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.jobCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.jobCustom3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.jobCustom4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.jobCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE jobCode = VALUES(jobCode), jobName = VALUES(jobName), jobAbbr = VALUES(jobAbbr), depID = VALUES(depID), adminID = VALUES(adminID), jobGrage = VALUES(jobGrage), jobType = VALUES(jobType), jobProperty = VALUES(jobProperty), jobNum = VALUES(jobNum), isCore = VALUES(isCore), effectDate = VALUES(effectDate), xorder = VALUES(xorder), isDisabled = VALUES(isDisabled), disabledDate = VALUES(disabledDate), remark = VALUES(remark), xType = VALUES(xType), jobCustom1 = VALUES(jobCustom1), jobCustom2 = VALUES(jobCustom2), jobCustom3 = VALUES(jobCustom3), jobCustom4 = VALUES(jobCustom4), jobCustom5 = VALUES(jobCustom5)

insert into ehr_employee (empID, workNo, name, eName, compID, depID, jobID, reportTo, wfreportTo, empStatus, jobStatus, empType, joinDate, workBeginDate, jobBeginDate, pracBeginDate, pracEndDate, probBeginDate, probEndDate, leaveDate, gender, email, mobile, officePhone, remark, disabled, empCustom1, empCustom2, empCustom3, empCustom4, empCustom5 ) values
(#{item.empID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.workNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.eName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.depID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.jobID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.reportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.wfreportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.empStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.jobStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.empType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.joinDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.workBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.jobBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.pracBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.pracEndDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.probBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.probEndDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.leaveDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.gender,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.officePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.disabled,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.empCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.empCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.empCustom3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.empCustom4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.empCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE workNo = VALUES(workNo), name = VALUES(name), eName = VALUES(eName), compID = VALUES(compID), depID = VALUES(depID), jobID = VALUES(jobID), reportTo = VALUES(reportTo), wfreportTo = VALUES(wfreportTo), empStatus = VALUES(empStatus), jobStatus = VALUES(jobStatus), empType = VALUES(empType), joinDate = VALUES(joinDate), workBeginDate = VALUES(workBeginDate), jobBeginDate = VALUES(jobBeginDate), pracBeginDate = VALUES(pracBeginDate), pracEndDate = VALUES(pracEndDate), probBeginDate = VALUES(probBeginDate), probEndDate = VALUES(probEndDate), leaveDate = VALUES(leaveDate), gender = VALUES(gender), email = VALUES(email), mobile = VALUES(mobile), officePhone = VALUES(officePhone), remark = VALUES(remark), disabled = VALUES(disabled), empCustom1 = VALUES(empCustom1), empCustom2 = VALUES(empCustom2), empCustom3 = VALUES(empCustom3), empCustom4 = VALUES(empCustom4), empCustom5 = VALUES(empCustom5)
